name: Top-Down Letters
description: Mirror of bottom-up-letters — characters descend from above the baseline rather than rising from below. Use when the layout wants downward energy or when the headline is positioned below another anchored element.
notes: Choose between bottom-up and top-down based on layout pull, not by default. A headline anchored to the bottom of frame benefits from top-down energy; one anchored at top benefits from bottom-up.
